name: Node Exporter
description: Exposes host-level hardware and OS metrics for Prometheus/Alloy scraping.
longDescription: Runs the official Prometheus node_exporter on each host. Exports CPU, memory, disk, filesystem, network, and load metrics in Prometheus text format. Alloy or any Prometheus-compatible collector will automatically discover this plugin as a scrape target via the platform HTTP SD endpoint.
author: Kleff
